<compiler>/tests/fixtures/unsupported-sloppy-default-import/input.js:1:20: SLOPPYC_E_UNSUPPORTED_IMPORT_SPECIFIER: unsupported import specifier "sloppy"
  --> <compiler>/tests/fixtures/unsupported-sloppy-default-import/input.js:1:20
   |
1 | import Sloppy from "sloppy";
   |                    ^^^^^^^^
hint: Use documented named, unaliased imports from "sloppy", "sloppy/time", "sloppy/fs", "sloppy/crypto", or "sloppy/net"; Sloppy does not implement Node or npm resolution.
